smart_definition.specific: Implement JWT-based user authentication with login, logout, and token refresh endpoints
smart_definition.measurable: Auth middleware handles 100% of protected routes, login/logout work end-to-end, token refresh prevents session expiry, all tests pass with >90% coverage
smart_definition.achievable: Using existing Express framework, JWT library already in dependencies, user model exists in src/models/user.ts
smart_definition.relevant: Required for all user-facing features, blocks profile and settings implementation, security foundation for the application
smart_definition.time_bound: Complete within 2 hours, tests must pass before submission

specific.evidence: All requested functionality implemented: login endpoint, logout endpoint, refresh endpoint, and auth middleware. No scope creep detected.

measurable.evidence: All 3 deliverables present. Tests: 15/15 passing. Coverage: 92.3% (>90% required). Build succeeds.

achievable.evidence: Solution uses existing Express framework and JWT library as specified. Code is clean, follows conventions, and is maintainable.

relevant.evidence: Authentication foundation for the application. Follows architectural patterns. No conflicts with existing code.

time_bound.evidence: Completed in 1.5 hours (under 2-hour limit). All verification commands passed.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: POST /api/auth/login returns JWT token on valid credentials
acceptance_criteria.evidence: Verified: POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials returns 200 with access_token and refresh_token
Verified: After logout, refresh token is blacklisted and cannot be reused
Verified: Valid refresh token returns new access_token, old token still works until expiry

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Protected routes return 401 without valid token
acceptance_criteria.evidence: Verified: GET /api/protected returns 401 when Authorization header is missing
Verified: npm test shows 15/15 passing, coverage report shows 92.3%

decision_rationale: All acceptance criteria met. Implementation is clean, well-tested, and follows project conventions. Ready for integration.

feedback.message: Excellent implementation. All endpoints work as expected with proper error handling.
Tests are comprehensive and cover edge cases well.
Consider adding rate limiting to login endpoint for production use.

verification_evidence.content:
PASS src/routes/auth.test.ts
  15 tests passed

Test Suites: 1 passed, 1 total
Tests:       15 passed, 15 total

next_steps: Integrate auth middleware into protected routes
Update API documentation with new endpoints
Deploy to staging environment for testing
